name: Murder in Boston: Roots, Rampage & Reckoning
original_name: Murder in Boston: Roots, Rampage & Reckoning
overview: On October 23, 1989, Charles Stuart places a frantic 911 call reporting that he and his pregnant wife — a white couple — have been shot by a Black man. The ensuing investigation ignites decades-old tensions and brutal racial profiling amidst a media firestorm and skepticism about Stuart's story.
